summary: Second review round: buildDeadlines now propagates the asObjects ok guard (errors on unexpected shape instead of silently 'No open programs'); icalUID hashes distinguishing fields so distinct zero-ID events at the same start get distinct UIDs.
reason: A follow-up PR review found the zero-ID and ok-guard fixes were applied to since.go/owed.go but not the parallel cases in ical.go (icalUID) and deadlines.go (buildDeadlines).
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli/... passes incl. TestIcalUIDZeroIDDistinct, TestBuildICSDistinctUIDsForZeroIDEvents, TestBuildDeadlinesUninterpretable.
